scenarios.description: children() rebuilds list when shadowChildrenRef.get() has been cleared by GC (shadowChildrenRef non-null but reference cleared)
scenarios.precondition: parent with two Element children, children() called once to populate cache
scenarios.expectedResult: second children() returns a new list instance (not the same as cached) containing both children

scenarios.expectedResult: next children() call returns correct list with single element and does not throw
